scope1_narrative: Scope 1 transport emissions for FY2024 stand at 22679 tCO2e, driven primarily by petrol and diesel consumption. The KETRACO grid factor of 0.392 kgCO2e/kWh was applied to all EV charging within the fleet.
intensity_narrative: At 1.351 tCO2e per KSh M, the company's intensity is above the sector average of 0.903, reflecting 54 active fleet vehicles.
uncertainty_narrative: The reported figure of 36762 tCO2e carries an uncertainty of ±6.7% at 95% confidence, reflecting emission factor, activity data, and road adjustment variance.
recommendation_narrative: Replacing 37% of short-haul business flights with video conferencing would reduce Scope 3 Cat 6 emissions by approximately 1904 tCO2e per year.
full_narrative: Scope 1 transport emissions for FY2024 stand at 22679 tCO2e, driven primarily by petrol and diesel consumption. Replacing 37% of short-haul business flights with video conferencing would reduce Scope 3 Cat 6 emissions by approximately 1904 tCO2e per year.
